evidence_direction_note: Re-tagged 2026-04-24T06:44Z from does_not_support to non_contributory. This run actually executed under queue_id V3-EXQ-418c (post-fix retest) but reused the 418a script, so the manifest inherited the 418a filename. SD-016 consumer fix was active (verified: EXQ-449b PASSed ~90s earlier on same host DLAPTOP-4.local with ab_channel_std=3.44e-3). However, WITH_SLEEP_SD016 and WITHOUT_SLEEP_SD016 conditions produced bit-for-bit identical per-seed metrics (action_bias_divergence, slot_diversity, eval_harm_rate all match to last decimal across all 3 seeds). SD-017 (sleep) ablation has zero observable effect on measured state -- the experiment cannot distinguish hypothesis from null. This is diagnostic of a broken/inert ablation, not disconfirming evidence. Route to /diagnose-errors for SD-017 retest design (sd016_enabled=True in both conditions; only SD-017 was ablated here).
